flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY College of Environmental Science and Forestry fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (67.9% → 55.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY College of Environmental Science and Forestry rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.1k → $5.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at SUNY College of Environmental Science and Forestry rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.0k → $22.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY College of Environmental Science and Forestry fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
